scripts.buildModuleWin: npm install --force && npm run buildTimelineWin && npm run buildMemoryWin && npm run buildClusterWin  && npm run buildOperatorWin  && npm run buildComputeWin && npm run buildJupyterWin
scripts.buildModuleLinux: npm run buildLibLinux && npm run buildTimelineLinux && npm run buildMemoryLinux && npm run buildClusterLinux  && npm run buildOperatorLinux  && npm run buildComputeLinux && npm run buildJupyterLinux
scripts.buildClusterWin: cd .\cluster && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildClusterLinux: cd ./cluster && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildMemoryWin: cd .\memory && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildMemoryLinux: cd ./memory && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildTimelineWin: cd .\timeline && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildTimelineLinux: cd ./timeline && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildOperatorWin: cd .\operator && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildOperatorLinux: cd ./operator && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildComputeWin: cd .\compute && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildComputeLinux: cd ./compute && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.buildJupyterWin: cd .\jupyter && npm run build && npm run publishWin
scripts.buildJupyterLinux: cd ./jupyter && npm run build && npm run publishLinux
scripts.test: npm install --force && npm run buildLibLinux && npm run testMemory && npm run testTimeline
